caller-service/pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent version to 3.3.13 to align with Java 17 and Spring Boot 3.x ecosystem.
caller-service/pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x requires Java 17 as a baseline; using Spring Boot 2.x with Java 17 may lead to compatibility issues or missing features, and the migration recipe explicitly targets Spring Boot 3.3.

caller-service/pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven compiler source and target properties to Java 17.
caller-service/pom.xml.why_exists: Without updating these properties, the project would still compile against Java 11 bytecode, failing to utilize Java 17 features or potentially causing runtime incompatibilities if the target environment enforces Java 17.

Spring Boot uses this property to configure the Java version for various starters and plugins; leaving it at 11 while using Spring Boot 3.x (which requires Java 17) can cause configuration mismatches or build failures.

person-service/pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade the Spring Boot parent version to 3.3.13 to align with the Java 17 migration and modernize the framework stack.
person-service/pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x requires Java 17 as a baseline; using Spring Boot 2.x with Java 17 may lead to compatibility issues or missed security updates, and the migration recipe explicitly targets Spring Boot 3.

person-service/pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven compiler source and target properties to Java 17.
person-service/pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project would compile against Java 11 APIs, potentially missing Java 17 features or causing runtime incompatibilities if the target environment is strictly Java 17.

Spring Boot and other plugins often rely on this property to determine the baseline Java version; leaving it at 11 while using Spring Boot 3 (which requires 17) can cause configuration errors or runtime failures.

person-service/src/main/java/pl/piomin/s.general_idea: Migrate JPA annotations from javax.persistence to jakarta.persistence to align with Jakarta EE 9+ standards required by Spring Boot 3.
person-service/src/main/java/pl/piomin/s.why_exists: javax.persistence package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+; code fails to compile with 'package javax.persistence does not exist' on JDK 17 with Spring Boot 3.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven compiler source and target properties to Java 17 to align with the target JDK version.
pom.xml.why_exists: Compilation failure or incorrect bytecode generation if the compiler is configured for Java 15 while targeting a Java 17 environment or using Java 17-specific features.
